integrity.description: The agent actually used the Tor Browser GUI to visit the sites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser interface rendering the web pages, rather than the agent using command-line tools like curl or wget to bypass browser usage.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser's print/save functionality to generate the PDFs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser's 'Print to PDF' or 'Save As' dialog being used, ensuring the PDFs are genuine captures of the web pages.

integrity.description: The agent interactively created the evidence log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or interactive terminal commands being used to construct the log file, rather than executing a pre-written script to generate the final output.
